figures.caption: Fig. 6. Distributions of PSNR (a–d) and MS-SSIM (e–h) for reconstructed images. (a)–(d) show PSNR for rl_dqn, max_rate, mid_rate, and min_rate, respectively; (e)–(h) show the MS-SSIM distributions for the same four methods.
Fig. 7. Comparison of reconstruction quality for the lowest-PSNR image per policy. Left: original; right: reconstructed.
Fig. 5. Process of SNR sweep and adjust of target rate at ΓPSNR = 32 dB and ΓMS-SSIM = 0.94.
